name: yutori-mcp-server
title: Yutori MCP
summary: Web monitoring, deep research, and browser automation tools powered by Yutori.
description: Yutori MCP gives AI agents access to Yutori's web automation platform through a single MCP server. It supports continuous web monitoring with Scouts, one-time deep web research tasks, and browser automation for websites that require clicking, typing, scrolling, or extracting structured results. The hosted server is available over streamable HTTP and supports OAuth authentication to Yutori. A local PyPI package is also available for API-key or saved-credential based authentication.

environment_variables.name: YUTORI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional Yutori API key for API-key based authentication. Can be omitted when the local client already has credentials saved by uvx yutori-mcp login or when the host manages Yutori authentication separately.

useCases.name: Continuous web monitoring
useCases.description: Create and manage Yutori Scouts that repeatedly monitor the web for product updates, competitor news, changelogs, pricing changes, funding announcements, and other recurring signals.

useCases.name: Deep web research
useCases.description: Run one-time research tasks that search, read, and synthesize information from across the web, with optional structured output and webhook delivery.

useCases.name: Browser automation
useCases.description: Automate browser tasks on websites, including data extraction, form workflows, logged-in desktop sessions through Yutori Local, and structured result collection.

yutoriOAuth.description: Authenticate with Yutori using OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE support.
